summary: Iteration 61: Frontend-only testing of GST Type dropdown fix in Edit School modal and invoice PDF generator. All 6 feature tests PASSED. GST Type dropdown correctly added to Edit School modal (showEditOnboardingModal), and invoice generator correctly handles all gst_type values with per-grade row generation.
critical_code_review_comments: invoicePdfGenerator.js line 308: gstType correctly reads from schoolData.onboarding_data.gst_type with fallback to payment.gst_type and 'exclusive_18' default — correct pattern.
AdminSchoolCRM.jsx line 3500: handleEditOnboarding correctly includes gst_type: existingOnboardData.gst_type || '' — correctly populated when modal opens.
AdminSchoolCRM.jsx line 3650: handleSaveEditOnboarding correctly sends gst_type: editOnboardData.gst_type || '' in PATCH payload — confirmed working end-to-end.
seed_data_creation: Followup Test 2 school's gst_type updated to 'exclusive_18' during testing (PATCH /api/schools/inquiry/99730d3f-b41a-4ff3-aa8b-fab452a0227f). 2 invoice PDFs generated: OLL2026/274521 and OLL2026/217621.

test_1_gst_type_edit_modal.details: GST Type dropdown (data-testid='edit-onboard-gst-type') is visible in Payment Details section of 'Edit School: [Name]' modal (showEditOnboardingModal). All options present: Select GST type, GST Inclusive @ 18% (inclusive_18), GST Exclusive @ 18% (exclusive_18), Book GST = 0% (book_gst_0).

test_2_gst_type_renewal_convert_modal.details: GST Type dropdown exists in Renewal Convert modal ('Renew School - tt'). Options: '', 'inclusive_18', 'exclusive_18', 'book_gst_0'. Triggered via Active Schools > Renewal dropdown > Direct Renewal (Skip Meeting).

test_3_gst_type_onboard_modal.details: GST Type dropdown exists in Onboarding modal ('Conversion Details: Durganand High School'). Options: '', 'inclusive_18', 'exclusive_18', 'book_gst_0'. Triggered from Meeting Done filter > Convert button.

test_4_gst_type_save_persists.details: Selecting 'exclusive_18' and clicking Save Changes: (1) PATCH request sent to /api/schools/inquiry/99730d3f-b41a-4ff3-aa8b-fab452a0227f (2) Toast: 'School details updated successfully' (3) On re-open, value shows 'exclusive_18' — data persisted correctly.

test_5_orders_generate_invoice_button.details: Orders page (/admin/orders) shows 7 Invoice buttons for school payments. Invoice buttons are clickable and trigger PDF generation.

test_6_invoice_generator_gst_handling.details: Invoice generator correctly handles gst_type values. Tested exclusive_18 (ABC School — Invoice OLL2026/274521) and inclusive_18 (TEST_Offerings school — Invoice OLL2026/217621). Both generated successfully with toast notifications. Code review confirms: line 308 reads from onboarding_data.gst_type, line 117 handles book_gst_0/book_gst, line 134 handles inclusive_18/inclusive, lines 312-419 generate per-grade rows from grade_pricing array.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 features from this iteration are verified. GST Type dropdown is now in all 3 modals: Edit School (NEW - lines 10087-10101), Renewal Convert (existing - lines 6996-7008), Onboarding Convert (existing - lines 9069-9081). Invoice generator uses correct field path (onboarding_data.gst_type) and handles all 3 gst_type values. Followup Test 2 school (id: 99730d3f) now has gst_type=exclusive_18 from the test.
